response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience and technical versatility, but his senior-level background and focus on advanced technologies (e.g., AI agents, low-latency systems) may exceed the requirements for this junior/mid-level role. His open-source contributions and renewable-energy-adjacent project (GISCollective) show alignment with the industry, but his overqualification and lack of explicit PostgreSQL experience are concerns.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/React/Nest.js experience from recent roles (Optilyz, re:cinq).
Proven open-source contributions in geo-data platforms (GISCollective), relevant to renewable energy/construction tech.
Demonstrated ability to integrate diverse data sources and build scalable architectures.
concerns: Overqualified for the role; may seek more senior responsibilities or higher compensation.
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL (preferred database) in recent work.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with remote-friendly senior roles he’s accustomed to.
